adText:
We started Blue Guardian with a few thousand dollars. 💰No big investors. No corporate backing.Just a teenager who saved up, a friend who put in his entire student loan, and one big idea:What if a prop firm actually worked for traders instead of against them?When I was 17, I tried to get funded. The prices were impossible. The rules were designed to make you fail.So at 18, I built something different.→ No restrictive rules
→ No overpriced challenges
→ No gatekeepingA few thousand dollars turned into 180,000+ traders worldwide.We're just getting started.Get funded

adText:
Most prop firms don't WANT you to pass.

They want your evaluation fee. 

Again. 

And again. 

And again.

Ridiculous profit targets. 

Daily loss limits that stop you out before lunch. 

Hidden rules that disqualify you AFTER you've done the work.

It's exhausting.

Blue Guardian was built different.

We use EOD (End of Day) drawdown rules... 

Which means you can actually BREATHE while you trade.

No daily loss limits strangling your strategy.

No gotcha clauses buried in 47 pages of fine print.

Just straightforward rules, real payouts, and a prop firm that actually WANTS you funded.

Because here's the thing...

When YOU win, WE win.

✅ Fair EOD drawdown rules
✅ Keep 80-90% profits
✅ 48-hour payouts
✅ Up to $400K accounts
✅ No hidden traps

Stop feeding money to firms designed to fail you.

Get funded by one that actually pays.

👉 Start your challenge: www.blueguardian.com/

adText:
100% free futures trading course built by traders and an industry-leading prop firm.

We made this course for:

✅ Absolute beginners to futures
✅ Crypto, stock, or options traders ready to branch out
✅ Anyone curious about prop firm funding
✅ Traders who care about risk over hype
✅ Anyone who actually wants to learn futures

Scroll on if you are:

❌ Already trading advanced strategies
❌ Want signals or guaranteed gains
❌ Not interested in sound trading principles

This is a course built by traders, for people who want to actually learn.

The best part is that it’s under 90 minutes, so you could finish it in one sitting.

Ready to dive in?

Click to get started.
